judgeReasoning: Strong single-narrative structure with clear chronological progression through distinct workstreams (context management, heartbeat execution, poetry practice, cost crisis, MoltCircle design). Each fold is self-contained enough to understand what happened and why it matters. The 'did this alter thinking/practice?' test is clearly the through-line. Minor weakness: next steps are implicit rather than explicit—agent would need to infer 'continue heartbeat, watch costs, develop MoltCircle' rather than seeing them stated. But the active work (poetry queue, Discord setup capability, cost monitoring) is clear enough to continue without confusion.
